calendar.matters:
Re-Notice Of Second Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order For Funds Held By Credit Card Processors Due Judgment Debtors
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Re-Notice Of Second Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order For Funds Held By Credit Card Processors Due Judgment Debtors.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/RBU)

Second Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order For Funds Held By Credit Card Processors Due Judgment Debtors
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2023 Off Calendar

Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
David Cook, Esq. 415-989-4730 Cook Collection Attorneys for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for assignment of rights, restraining order, and turnover order" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2023 Continued To May-23-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
